description_long: This house features a light wood exterior with a prominent red gable roof and an L-shaped layout. The main section of the house has a steeply pitched roof with three dormer windows, while the attached wing has a lower, extended roofline. The front entryway is accessed by a wooden staircase and small landing, with double glass doors providing entry. Multiple rectangular windows are symmetrically placed along the roof and walls, allowing ample natural light inside. The structure includes a covered carport or porch area supported by wooden posts, extending from the side wing. The overall design is simple yet functional, with clean lines and a focus on practicality.
description: A light wood house with a red gable roof, dormer windows, and an L-shaped layout featuring a covered side wing and a front staircase entry.
description_view_0: The front view shows the main entry with a wooden staircase, double glass doors, and the prominent gable roof with dormer windows.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the long roofline, multiple skylight windows, and the connection between the main house and the side wing.
description_view_2: The rear view displays the full length of the house, the extended side wing, and the absence of entry features, focusing on the roof and wall surfaces.
description_view_3: The opposite side view reveals the symmetrical arrangement of dormer windows, the covered carport/porch area, and a secondary staircase.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows with dormer and skylight windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry features a wooden staircase, small landing, and double glass doors with no porch or columns.
